zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Sotherton於1504年3月5日出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Nicholas Sotherton14歲，母親Agnes Wright19歲。她和Sir John Aldrich至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1587年4月3日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年83歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Sotherton于1504年3月5日出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Nicholas Sotherton14岁，母亲Agnes Wright19岁。她和Sir John Aldrich至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1587年4月3日在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年83岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Sotherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Southerton
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more places called Southerton or Sotherton, including Sotherton (Suffolk), which derives from Old English sūtherra ‘southern, southerly’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Sotherton was born on 5 March 1504, in Suffolk, England, her father, Nicholas Sotherton, was 14 and her mother, Agnes Wright, was 19. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Sir John Aldrich. She died on 3 April 1587, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Sotherton est née le 5 mars 1504, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Sotherton, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wright, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Sir John Aldrich. Elle est décédée le 3 avril 1587, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Sotherton am 5. März 1504 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Sotherton 14 und ihre Mutter Agnes Wright 19. Sie hatte mit Sir John Aldrich mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. April 1587 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sotherton è nata il il 5 marzo 1504 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Nicholas Sotherton, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Agnes Wright, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Sir John Aldrich. Morì il 3 aprile 1587, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sothertonが1504年3月5日にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Nicholas Sothertonは14歳，母Agnes Wrightは19歳であった。彼女はSir John Aldrichとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1587年4月3日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで83歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sotherton(이)가 1504년 3월 5일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Sotherton(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Wright(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Aldrich(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 4월 3일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.5 March 1504–Apr 3 1587: 5 de março de 1504–3 de abril de 1587
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Sotherton nasceu em 5 de março de 1504, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Sotherton, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wright, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir John Aldrich. Ela faleceu em 3 de abril de 1587, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Sotherton родилась 5 марта 1504 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Sotherton было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wright, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir John Aldrich. Она умерла 3 апреля 1587 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.5 March 1504–Apr 3 1587: 5 de marzo de 1504–3 de abril de 1587
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Sotherton nació el 5 de marzo de 1504, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Sotherton, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Agnes Wright, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir John Aldrich. Murió el 3 de abril de 1587, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
